debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
          unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
          generalize h_zero : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
          have : 0 = v.eval := by rw [←h_zero, Exp.eval]
          rw [this]; clear h_zero this
          induction w with
          | zero => have : args = #v[] := by simp; simp [this]
          | succ w ih =>
            intros; simp [Vector.insertIdx_zero, ih, Exp.eval, bits2num]
            sorry
        rw [this] at h_eq
        exact h' h_eq.symm
      simp [h_eval]
    have : (assert_bits_e args (Cs.eq0 (bits2num_e args - e) .nil)).eval = .n := by
      rw [reduce₁ h_assert, this]
    contradiction
